metric_name: raw provenance sample identity checksum/provider validation
evidence_dependency: Approved raw input manifest plus checksum/provider identity evidence
reportable_range_impact: No interpretation if provenance identity or checksum/provider validation is missing
next_action: Populate validated identity/checksum acceptance criteria after approved known-answer/input validation.

evidence_dependency: Known-answer tumor-normal pairing manifests and sample identity checks
reportable_range_impact: No interpretation if tumor-normal pairing is missing inconsistent or ambiguous
next_action: Define sample-pairing failure modes and acceptance checks after validation fixtures are reviewed.

metric_name: reference build index and contig compatibility
evidence_dependency: Known-answer BAM/CRAM or FASTQ alignment validation with reference-build audit
reportable_range_impact: No interpretation if reference build or contigs are mismatched
next_action: Lock accepted reference build and contig policies after benchmark execution.

metric_name: coverage depth breadth and callable-region adequacy
evidence_dependency: Known-answer WGS coverage distribution and callable-region performance
reportable_range_impact: No interpretation if coverage/callable-region QC is below locked thresholds
next_action: Estimate minimum coverage/breadth thresholds from HG008/COLO829 and replicate validation evidence.

metric_name: SNV/indel precision recall and normalization concordance
evidence_dependency: HG008 small-variant truth benchmark with callable-region denominator
reportable_range_impact: No small-variant feature reporting if concordance thresholds are not met
next_action: Lock recall/precision and normalization acceptance criteria after HG008 truth benchmark execution.

metric_name: allele-specific CNV/LOH reciprocal overlap and purity/ploidy plausibility
evidence_dependency: HG008 and COLO829 CNV/LOH known-answer benchmarks plus primary CNV tool validation
reportable_range_impact: No CNV/LOH or scarHRD features until allele-specific segments pass validation
next_action: Lock CNV/LOH overlap purity and ploidy thresholds after primary CNV tool validation.

metric_name: production SV caller reciprocal overlap and breakpoint tolerance
evidence_dependency: HG008 and COLO829 SV truth benchmarks plus production SV caller output
reportable_range_impact: No SV signature or rearrangement features until SV caller thresholds pass
next_action: Lock reciprocal-overlap and breakpoint tolerance thresholds after production SV caller validation.

metric_name: minimum usable SNV/indel count and reconstruction QC
evidence_dependency: SigProfiler/known-answer signature controls and reconstruction quality validation
reportable_range_impact: No signature interpretation below locked mutation-count or reconstruction thresholds
next_action: Lock mutation-count and reconstruction QC thresholds after signature adapter validation.

metric_name: complete feature vector calibration and no-call propagation
evidence_dependency: Validated small-variant CNV/LOH SV signature inputs plus CHORD/HRDetect/scarHRD adapter validation
reportable_range_impact: No integrated HRD class/score until every component feature class is validated
next_action: Lock integrated model input requirements and no-call propagation after component validation.

metric_name: reportable range approved language and reviewer signoff completeness
evidence_dependency: Clinical validation packet report template language approval and reviewer signoff
reportable_range_impact: No report generation for clinical interpretation until signoff and reportable range are approved
next_action: Lock report-generation gate only after validation packet and reviewer signoff are complete.
